name: Home Mods for Severe Ladder Injuries

mainEntity.name: Does comp cover home modifications after ladder paralysis in Centerville?
mainEntity.text: Does comp cover home modifications after ladder paralysis in Centerville?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if medically necessary: ramps, grab bars up to reasonable cost. Prior approval via UR; appeals if denied.

suggestedAnswer.text: Centerville rare paralysis cases qualify under Utah §34A-2-418. Get OT eval for needs. Insurers cap at $25K typically—litigate for full wheelchair accessibility.

description: Yes, if medically necessary: ramps, grab bars up to reasonable cost. Prior approval via UR; appeals if denied.
